steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "it was not a surprise" shows that the action taken by readers directly led to the book receiving a Newbery Honor. The blank must indicate a positive response that justifies predicting the award.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
C) "praised" directly describes a positive reader response that would logically result in the book being honored.

The other choices either contradict this (A/D) or describe actions readers cannot perform (B—readers don’t create books).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
